description.en: Earlier R-CNN systems depended on external region proposal algorithms, creating a bottleneck between feature extraction and detection. Faster R-CNN introduced a Region Proposal Network that shares convolutional features with the detector. This unified two-stage pipeline became a standard reference point for accurate object detection.
description.zh: 早期 R-CNN 系统依赖外部候选区域算法，在特征提取与检测之间形成瓶颈。Faster R-CNN 引入区域建议网络，与检测器共享卷积特征。这个统一的两阶段流水线成为高精度目标检测的标准参照。

subcaption.en: Portrait from Kaiming He's MIT-hosted personal page.

license.en: Personal website photo; rights not stated.
license.zh: 个人网站照片；未说明复用权利。
